revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Must log in]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Must log in]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: ack, looks like return page has to be added manually
1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{if IP|<big>{{warnsign}}: You are not logged in. Please {{plainlink|url=https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:CreateAccount&returnto={{{return|}}}|name=create an account}} or {{plainlink|url=https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:UserLogin&returnto={{{return|}}}|name=log in}} to proceed.</big>{{{extra|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
